description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow featuring a spacious open-plan layout with large windows along the main facades, allowing for ample natural light. The structure includes a prominent garage with a driveway, a backyard swimming pool surrounded by a privacy fence, and a mix of brick and light-colored wall finishes. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic, and the property is bordered by landscaped greenery. The interior appears to be divided into distinct living, kitchen, and bedroom areas, with visible furniture and fixtures. The front entrance is set back from the street, and the overall design emphasizes both privacy and outdoor leisure.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a backyard pool, featuring brick and light wall finishes.
description_view_0: This view highlights the garage, driveway, and backyard pool area, with the main living spaces and large windows visible on the right.
description_view_1: From this angle, the open-plan living and kitchen areas are prominent, and the pool and garage are seen in the background.
description_view_2: This side shows the long facade with extensive windows, the garage, and the pool area, emphasizing the bungalow's length.
description_view_3: The view focuses on the pool, garage entrance, and the rear of the bungalow, with the main entry and living spaces set further back.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on main facades
